mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, is_auto_enabled, use_dollar_first, max_amount_per_tx, residual_handling, created_at, updated_at FROM fx_auto_settings WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_auto_settings (user_id, is_auto_enabled, use_dollar_first, max_amount_per_tx, residual_handling) VALUES (#{userId}, #{isAutoEnabled}, #{useDollarFirst}, #{maxAmountPerTx}, #{residualHandling}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_auto_enabled = VALUES(is_auto_enabled), use_dollar_first = VALUES(use_dollar_first), max_amount_per_tx = VALUES(max_amount_per_tx), residual_handling = VALUES(residual_handling)
